rationale: The Gemini candidate provides the most natural and technically accurate translation. It correctly handles the MDX structure and asset paths. It uses standard Chinese technical terminology (e.g., '构造函数', '处理程序', '宿主环境') and maintains the informal yet professional tone of the original. Other candidates had minor issues like inconsistent spacing or slightly less natural phrasing in the explanation sections.
